name: C2xSetTokenInt
title: C2xSetTokenInt
syntax: long C2xSetTokenInt( long packet, char protocolDesignatorl[], char tokenDesignator[], long value ); // form 1
long C2xSetTokenInt( long packet, char protocolDesignatorl[], char tokenDesignator[], long byteOffset, long length, long networkByteOrder, long value ); // form 2
description: This function sets the integer value of a token.
Form 2 with byte offset sets a part of the token data as integer.

parameters.name: packet
parameters.description: Handle of a packet that has been created with C2xInitPacket.

parameters.name: protocolDesignator
parameters.description: Name of the protocol, e.g. geo_cnh.

parameters.name: tokenDesignator
parameters.description: Name of the token, e.g. lpvSpeed.

parameters.name: byteOffset
parameters.description: Offset from the beginning of the token in byte.

parameters.name: length
parameters.description: Length of the integer value, must be 1, 2, 3 or 4 byte.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
